login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your account credentials to continue
login.errLogin: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
login.ssoError: We couldn't sign you in with Google. Please try again or contact your administrator.
login.ssoUnavailable: Google sign-in isn't configured. Please use your email and password.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Create a new account in the HRM system
register.errRegister: Registration failed. The email may already be in use.

setPassword.title: Set your password
setPassword.subtitle: Create a password to activate your account
setPassword.hint: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase and a number.
setPassword.errInvalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired. Please contact your administrator to resend the invitation.
setPassword.missingToken: The invite token is missing from the link. Please open the exact link from your invitation email.
setPassword.successMessage: Your password has been set. Please sign in to get started.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.sentMessage: If the address below matches an account in the system, you'll receive a password reset link shortly. The link expires in 1 hour.
forgotPassword.sentSpamHint: Didn't get the email? Check your Spam folder, or contact your administrator if you're unsure this address has an account.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account
resetPassword.hint: At least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase and a number.
resetPassword.errInvalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.missingToken: The reset token is missing from the link. Please open the exact link from your email.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. Please sign in with your new password.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.fullNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters

brand.headline:
Smarter
HR Management
brand.sub: Modern HRM platform that helps you manage employees, attendance, leave, and payroll — all in one system.
